title: eriogonum racemosum
intro: Eriogonum racemosum, also known as the California buckwheat or clustered buckwheat, is a flowering plant native to the western United States and Canada. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects, due to the presence of flavonoids and phenolic acids. The health benefits of Eriogonum racemosum include its potential to reduce inflammation, improve cardiovascular health, and act as an antioxidant, which may help to protect against cell damage and oxidative stress. Eriogonum racemosum can be prepared as a herbal tea, infusion, or tincture, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal properties.
